name: fabrico-collections
description: Codex workflow skills and MCP integrations for end-to-end software delivery.

interface.shortDescription: End-to-end software delivery workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: A curated collection of standalone Codex workflow and engineering skills, plus optional MCP integrations for discovery, planning, implementation, modernization, and review. This plugin does not bundle custom-agent profiles; run the repository installer to add them for delegated execution.
defaultPrompt: Use $fabrico-collections:fabrico-implement to deliver this task end to end.
Use $fabrico-collections:fabrico-review to review the current changes.
Use $fabrico-collections:fabrico-autopilot to build the attached specification.
